items.title: CISA Warns of Oracle E-Business Suite Vulnerability Actively Exploited in Attacks
items.description:
The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has added a critical vulnerability in Oracle E-Business Suite, tracked as CVE-2026-46817, to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog after confirming active exploitation in attacks. This flaw impacts Oracle Payments, a component of Oracle E-Business Suite. It could allow unauthorized remote attackers to take full control of [] 
 The post CISA Warns of Oracle E-Business Suite Vulnerability Actively Exploited in Att

items.kev_name: Oracle E-Business Suite Improper Privilege Management Vulnerability
items.kev_action: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.

title: SENTINEL APEX — CISA Warns of Oracle E-Business Suite Vulnerability Actively Exploited in Attack

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-46817 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-16T13:41:06Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-46817", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-46817 Exploitation Attempt - KEV_EXPLOIT"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:9166575; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-16, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title:
CVE-2026-15428: An OS
command injection vulnerability exists in Archer VX800v v1 due to insufficient input sanitization of
the domain na
items.description:
An OS
command injection vulnerability exists in Archer VX800v v1 due to insufficient input sanitization of
the domain name parameter. An adjacent attacker who can access the relevant
HTTP interface can modify the parameter to inject shell metacharacters, resulting
in arbitrary code execution with root privileges.









Successful
exploitation may allow remote code execution and complete compromise of the
device.

items.title: CVE-2026-59837: A stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability in Fortinet FortiOS 7.4.0 through 7.4.1, FortiOS 7.2 all versions, FortiPAM
items.description: A stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability in Fortinet FortiOS 7.4.0 through 7.4.1, FortiOS 7.2 all versions, FortiPAM 1.8.0 through 1.8.2, FortiPAM 1.7 all versions, FortiPAM 1.6 all versions, FortiPAM 1.5 all versions, FortiPAM 1.4 all versions, FortiPAM 1.3 all versions, FortiPAM 1.2 all versions, FortiPAM 1.1 all versions, FortiPAM 1.0 all versions, FortiProxy 7.4.0 through 7.4.13, FortiProxy 7.2 all versions may allow a privileged authenticated attacker who can bypass stack protection and ASLR to execute arbitrary code or commands via crafted HTTP requests.

items.title:
CVE-2026-15427: An OS command
injection vulnerability exists in the TR-069 / CWMP management interface of Archer VX1800v v1 due to insuf
items.description:
An OS command
injection vulnerability exists in the TR-069 / CWMP management interface of Archer VX1800v v1 due to insufficient input validation and sanitization of
parameters, allowing crafted input to be executed as system-level commands.
Exploitation requires specific conditions such as TR-069 being enabled and ability
to influence ACS-delivered commands, compromise or control an ACS server.





Successful
exploitation may allow arbitrary command execution with root privileges,
resulting in complete compromise of the device.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-59835 A exposure of resource to wrong sphere vulnerability in Fortinet 
id: 1a8de06c-5b6a-56ff-92f1-929b1e8699a6
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-59835 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-59835
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/16
modified: 2026/07/16
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-59835 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-16T13:41:06Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-59835", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-59835 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:5332947; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-16, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.recommended_sla_action: URGENT PATCH — Critical severity, deploy fix within 72 hours
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

items.title: CVE-2026-59204: Pillow is a Python imaging library. From 8.2.0 through 12.2.0, src/libImaging/Jpeg2KDecode.c accumulates total_component
items.description: Pillow is a Python imaging library. From 8.2.0 through 12.2.0, src/libImaging/Jpeg2KDecode.c accumulates total_component_width across every tile in a JPEG2000 image instead of recomputing it per tile, allowing a crafted tiled JPEG2000 file to force substantially higher transient memory usage and trigger out-of-memory failures during decoding. This issue is fixed in version 12.3.0.

items.title: CVE-2026-14645: Nexus Repository 3 does not validate the destination of the "Webhook: Global" capability's configured URL before making
items.description: Nexus Repository 3 does not validate the destination of the "Webhook: Global" capability's configured URL before making an outbound HTTP request, allowing a user holding the Capability Administration permission to cause the server to send requests to internal network locations (Server-Side Request Forgery). This permission is granted by role assignment, independent of authentication status, so an unauthenticated user could also trigger this behavior if the anonymous role has been granted the permission.

items.title: CVE-2026-15429: A privilege escalation vulnerability exists in the HTTP authentication component in Archer VX1800v v1. Improper handling
items.description:
A privilege escalation vulnerability exists in the HTTP authentication component in Archer VX1800v v1. Improper handling of user-controlled input may allow newline characters to be injected into internally constructed configuration data.









An
authenticated user with sufficient privileges may be able to modify account
settings and gain elevated administrative privileges.

items.title: CVE-2026-59199: Pillow is a Python imaging library. Prior to 12.3.0, Pillow public image coordinate APIs can trigger a native heap out-o
items.description: Pillow is a Python imaging library. Prior to 12.3.0, Pillow public image coordinate APIs can trigger a native heap out-of-bounds write when given coordinates near the signed 32-bit integer limits in Image.paste(), Image.crop(), or Image.alpha_composite(). This issue is fixed in version 12.3.0.
